Beverly Hills building permits

Coverage notes

Official portal plus live coverage

Official Beverly Hills portal for permit applications, plan review, and project lookup.

Beverly Hills has public data coverage in PermitPulse, but the official Community Development Portal portal remains the primary source for building permit lookup and record confirmation.
